findings.description: Knowledge file labels the outbound/return section as '**[復路処理]**', but the source file explicitly says '**[往路処理]**' (the RST anchor is `_outbound:`, suggesting a source documentation error, but the visible text is 往路処理). The knowledge file silently corrects it to 復路処理 without basis in the source text.
findings.source_evidence:
Source: `.. _outbound:

**[往路処理]**
  **5. (正常終了)**` — Knowledge file: `**[復路処理]**`

findings.description: PascalCase class name `CommandLine` appears in step 1 of the handler processing flow ('`CommandLine` オブジェクトより取得する') but is absent from the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source step 1: '起動引数 **-messageRequestId** の値を `CommandLine`_ オブジェクトより取得する'
